CVE-2018-20781.title: In pam/gkr-pam-module.c in GNOME Keyring before 3.27.2, the user' ...
CVE-2018-20781.description: In pam/gkr-pam-module.c in GNOME Keyring before 3.27.2, the user's password is kept in a session-child process spawned from the LightDM daemon. This can expose the credential in cleartext.
